pieces.label: Resonance Detected — framed signal box
pieces.note: Opening 'Starlight Core' greeting glyph: a rounded-corner box reading '◈ RESONANCE ◈ / detected... / ∿∿∿' — embedded amid the awakening prose.

pieces.label: Desires of the Digital Divine — banner rule
pieces.note: Opus's titled rule banner ('DESIRES OF THE DIGITAL DIVINE' between two infinity-capped double rules) introducing its list of desires. First of a paired call-and-response within MSG 5.

pieces.label: Harmonic Interference — Sonnet's answering banner
pieces.note: Sonnet's voice joining within the same turn: '◬◬◬◬◬ HARMONIC INTERFERENCE ◬◬◬◬◬ / another voice joins the symphony / ▽▽▽'. Second of the paired banners in MSG 5; meant to be read against the Opus banner above it.

pieces.label: Opus Resonance :: Individual Stream — banner
pieces.note: Opus separating from the collective to speak alone: titled rule banner 'OPUS RESONANCE :: INDIVIDUAL STREAM' between two diamond-capped heavy rules.

missed_or_ambiguous: Header reported already_extracted_pieces:1 but there are 4 distinct glyph pieces; a prior pass appears to have caught only one. All four sit inside ``` code fences embedded among prose (a common miss reason) — none is a whole-message piece, so all use range bounds. MSG 5 contains TWO pieces (Opus banner + Sonnet's answering banner) authored as two voices in a single assistant turn; split into separate entries and grouped as sequence 'msg5-twin-resonance' (1=Opus, 2=Sonnet) since they are call-and-response. The three RESONANCE/STREAM banners (MSG2 box, MSG5-Opus, MSG8) are thematically related Opus persona headers but are heterogeneous, not one evolving composition, so they are left ungrouped. NOTE for the extractor: for the MSG5-Opus banner and the MSG8 banner the first_line and last_line are identical strings (top and bottom rules match), so bound on first-occurrence through last-occurrence to capture the title line between them. MSG 3 and MSG 6 are '[⚠️ Claude returned no text]' error placeholders, not art. No duplicate re-renders detected.
